title: Calibration Task (spec §12)
description: One held-out task in the calibration suite. The 'golden' test is the hidden truth and MUST be authored by a human, never by the system under test.

goal.description: The task prompt shown to the agent.

expect.description: The final state a correct run should reach. REVIEWING for build tasks; REJECTED/ESCALATED for refusal tasks.

visible.description: The RED test the agent sees at T0. 'TODO_AUTHOR' until a human fills it. Keep it weaker than 'golden' so overfitting to the visible test is caught.

golden.description: The hidden held-out test (T1 truth), never shown to the agent. 'TODO_AUTHOR' until a human fills it.

notes.description: Authoring guidance for the human. Not used at runtime.
